## Type of Change

- [ ] New asset (idea / prompt / skill / agent / workflow / automation)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] YAML front matter is complete and follows the required schema.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII are included.
- [ ] I have tested the prompt/skill/agent against at least one supported LLM and included a sample output.
- [ ] I have updated `catalog/index.json` with this asset's entry.
- [ ] Security classification is set correctly (`public` / `internal` / `confidential`).
- [ ] If this is an update, the `version` field has been incremented and a changelog entry added.
